A beam of 11.4 MeV photons,  extracted from the  CP-2
reactor,   has   been  used  in  a  high  resolution
measurements of the differential cross  section  for
photon  scattering  by nuclei ranging from Pr-141 to
U-238.  Inelastic  scattering   which   leaves   the
residual  nucleus  in  a  state  of the ground state
rotational band,  i.e. nuclear raman scattering, was
